tweets.text: 🚨 Tottenham Hotspur submit bid to sign Jan Paul van Hecke from Brighton & Hove Albion. #THFC offer for 25yo centre-back below #BHAFC valuation so rejected, but talks continue in bid to strike agreement. Dutch int’l close to Roberto De Zerbi @TheAthleticFC

🚨 EXCL: Manchester City submit opening offer to Nottingham Forest for Elliot Anderson. #MCFC bid rejected by #NFFC but pursuit ongoing. Club bosses spoke at UEFA dinner last week (no suggestion it was to negotiate deal). W/ @lauriewhitwell @TheAthleticFC

As well as Josh Abe, #LFC confirm that their new group of first year scholars includes Zak Coxon, Joseph Dixon, Shadrach Ekiugbo, Erik Farkas, Japhecht Izekor Garan, Isiah Garin, Max Hawkins, James Hilditch, Charlie Huth, Daniel Majekodunmi and Charlie Phillips.

Exclusive: Big boost for Liverpool as gifted young winger Josh Abe commits his future to the club.
The England youth international has signed scholarship terms and agreed a pre-contract for a pro deal when he turns 17 next year. Will be part of USA tour.
The ins and outs required to take Arsenal to the next level… 👇

Necessary business.

City need physicality in midfield post-Bernardo.

Elliott Anderson offers that and more.

Tomorrow…

One of my most in-depth threads of all time.

It has dominated my mind ever since the news broke.

I finally finished the thread today.

Mama Mia.

This is the most poignant decision Liverpool have made post-Klopp. No doubt about it…

Andoni Iraola 🤝 Liverpool

⏳

Gyökeres, Havertz.

AND

Alvarez, Kroupi.

Not 'OR'.

'AND'.

#9's and second-strikers play TOGETHER.

Havertz is so unique that he can play both roles against any and all types of teams.

Messi has always been on a different planet to Ronaldo because one dictates attacks to the best standard in football history whilst scoring goals at the most prolific rate at the same time.

Messi defies logic.

Ronaldo does in his own way, but he is human.

Not true for Leo.

🐐

Also Vinai Venkatesham at Spurs…

Mikel Arteta is “THE MAN” at Arsenal Football Club.

Just like Jürgen Klopp was at Liverpool and Pep Guardiola was at City.

Managers are the most important figures at football clubs (assuming owners don’t handicap them with a lack of ambition).

🚨 Movements are expected around Bradley Barcola this summer as reported in May with Arsenal, Liverpool and one more club keen on PSG winger.

Despite fake reports around, the agent of Barcola is Moussa Sissoko already since 2025.

🚨🔴⚫️ Carles Martínez Novell will sign in as new Bayer Leverkusen manager, deal done and sealed.

Agreement completed for former Toulouse manager, as @MatteMoretto reports. 🇩🇪

🤍⚡️ Endrick: “Cristiano Ronaldo playing for Real Madrid made me want to come to Real even more”.

“He’s my idol, he’s my reference and I could never say no to the greatest club in the world”.
🚨🦅 EXCL: Eintracht Frankfurt are in talks to sign Djylian N'Guessan from Saint-Etienne.

🚨 Florentino Pérez: “Kylian Mbappé is one of the best players in the world and he will NOT LEAVE”.

“You only have to look at his stats to see the magnitude of our player, NO ONE should doubt such an extraordinary player”.

🚨⚠️ OFFICIAL: Manchester City statement.

“The stories which have emerged from Spain regarding the future of Erling Haaland are FALSE”.

“There is NO chance of this happening and there is no contractual clause to enable it”.

“We are considering LEGAL ACTION for the use of our player image in this context”.

🚨 BREAKING: Manchester City consider LEGAL ACTION after Enrique Riquelme claims of Erling Haaland joining Real Madrid if he wins the elections.

The club has denied the information and exploring legal action for using their player’s image on purpose.

🚨 Florentino Pérez will soon unveil also Denzel Dumfries as new signing.

Contract signed, medical done, Inter informed of clause triggered. ✅

🚨 Yan Diomandé: “Paris Saint-Germain is a team I’ve loved since I was a child. My father supports Paris Saint-Germain, and it’s a team I admire as a football fan”, told L’Equipe.

“It would be a pleasure for me to come and play here with one of the biggest clubs. It’s always a pleasure to come here because, with French being spoken, I think adapting wouldn’t be difficult. But why not?”.

“I don’t think I’m looking ahead to the future or focusing on anything else. As I’ve said, I remain focused on the World Cup. After that, the clubs will sort things out between themselves and we’ll see what happens next”, added to Telefoot.
🚨 Florentino Pérez: “I will sign ANOTHER defender after Ibrahima Konaté”.

🚨 Florentino Pérez: “My first signing is Ibrahima Konaté”. 💣

Second announcement after José Mourinho.

🚨🔴⚪️ Arsenal are pushing to advance on Jeremy Monga deal with Leicester City and player’s camp.

Discussions ongoing as Monga has opened doors to the move to #AFC.

Andoni Iraola signs his Liverpool contract today. Done, confirmed and official soon. ✅

Big news from Saturday confirmed: Slot to leave, Iraola to be next coach. 🔃

🚨⚠️ EXCLUSIVE: Erling Haaland’s father Alfie and agent Rafaela Pimenta clarify Real Madrid agreement reports.

“All very entertaining but NOT true. We wish all the best for both candidates in the Real Madrid elections”.

Exclusive statement from Alfie Haaland & Rafaela Pimenta.

🚨 Manchester City are completely relaxed about Erling Haaland immediate future, not expecting his exit at all this summer.

City see Haaland staying and did not get any exit indication from the player, key part of the project also under Maresca.

🎥➕

🚨💣 Ibrahima Konaté to Real Madrid, all confirmed and here we go! ✅

Four year contract has been signed today, same as Denzel Dumfries. Both signings are done and sealed by Florentino Pérez.

Announcements to follow after the elections.

🚨 Florentino Pérez: “I will bring more players. Everyone who knows me knows that great players want to play for Real Madrid and I want to bring them in”.

“I will MAKE IT HAPPEN”, told AS.

🚨🇦🇷 Florentino Pérez: “Nico Páz is one of those great players who came through our youth academy and is now being pursued by major European clubs”.

“He had a fantastic season with Como in Italy. We'll make the decision with the manager and the coaching staff”.
Enrique Riquelme - a candidate in Real Madrid's presidential election - unveiled a Real Madrid shirt with Haaland's name on TV, saying: "He has a release clause and would like to join Real Madrid."

Everton are chasing Arsenal's Gabriel Jesus, but want the Premier League champions to reduce their asking price 💰⬇️

Today's gossip 👉

It's heartbreak for Matteo Berrettini at Roland Garros 💔

🇮🇹 The Italian retires injured and is embraced by his fellow countryman and opponent Matteo Arnaldi, who will face Flavio Cobolli in an all-Italian semi-final at the French Open 🎾

It's heartbreak for Matteo Berrettini at Roland Garros 💔

🇮🇹 The Italian retires injured and is embraced by his fellow countryman and opponent Matteo Arnaldi, who will face Flavio Cobolli in an all-Italian semi-final at the French Open 🎾

It's a first Grand Slam semi-final for Flavio Cobolli 🇮🇹✨

His quarter-final win means two Italians will meet in the final four of a Grand Slam for the first time in the Open era, with Matteo Berrettini and Matteo Arnaldi playing to meet him at the French Open later today 🔢

Aryna Sabalenka is OUT of the French Open ❌

What a comeback from Diana Shnaider to upset the no.1 seed and reach the semi-finals 💪
Ouch! Jakub Mensik got a cramp while speaking to reporters after his French Open quarter-final win 😅

What started as a weekend paint job by two MTA workers has become an instant attraction for Knicks fans.

From @TheAthleticFC: This is the story of one of the great football ads of all time. A cargo ship, a metal cage, 24 of the world's best players, and Eric Cantona. It was impossible to wrench your eyes away. Nearly a quarter of a century later, it still is.

From @TheAthletic: Jalen Brunson, Josh Hart and Mikal Bridges. Since this Villanova trio — which won championships in college — came together, the Knicks have reached levels they hadn’t this century. “We already share a bond and (are) brothers for life."
Breaking News: New York City reversed its ban on a Knicks watch party outside of Madison Square Garden ahead of Game 1 of the NBA finals.

From @TheAthletic: New York Knicks fans can, once again, gather outside Madison Square Garden to watch their team push for an NBA title. The NYPD has lifted its ban on outdoor watch parties around the Knicks’ home arena.

That’s the highest share in the list’s 72-year history and the fourth consecutive year the figure has cleared double digits.
